title: Synchronizing two board, in the same workspace
excerpt:

Is it possible to create two tables of the same structure, (with different permissions a table for the guests, and a table for my colleagues) and when he creates an item in a table, it is also created in th…

posts.author: ElsaL (Elsa Lou)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

Is it possible to create two tables of the same structure, (with different permissions a table for the guests, and a table for my colleagues) and when he creates an item in a table, it is also created in the other. Is there a way to sync two tables? I have problems with a permission on my main board and if I change it, it also changes for the guests and it is very very restrictive.

Best regards

Elsa

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @ElsaL - you should checkout the VLOOKUP app. This is a very simple way to keep multiple boards in sync and we have used it for a number of clients.

Hope this helps!
Mark

Green Llamas

monday.com + Green Llamas

posts.author: ElsaL (Elsa Lou)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

thank you very much, but I would have liked a free solution and not paid software.

Best regards
